scintilla-4.2.3.patch

* Update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite to 4.2.3
* Update distinfo on both

Changelog: https://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

Both pass portlint. Both tested in poudriere for 11-i186, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64.
